Mother’s Day (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,492,859Details
International Box Office $19,874,163
Worldwide Box Office $52,367,022
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,987,453
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,547,461
Total $5,534,914
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Intertwining stories revolve around a television host, a divorcee looking for love and a woman who wants to strengthen her relationship with her mother.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,369,184 (25.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,035 opening theaters/3,291 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $44,926,544

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 29th, 2016 (Wide) by Open Road
International Releases: April 22nd, 2016 (Wide) (Argentina)
April 24th, 2016 (Wide) (Hungary)
April 27th, 2016 (Wide) (Slovakia)
April 28th, 2016 (Wide) (Netherlands)
April 28th, 2016 (Wide) (Portugal)
Video Release: July 19th, 2016 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for language and some suggestive material.
(Rating bulletin 2411 (Cert #50274), 2/10/2016)
Running Time: 118 minutes
Franchise: Garry Marshall's Holiday Franchise
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Segments
Plot point: Adopted Family Seeking Reunion, Bigotry, Divorcée Romance, Dysfunctional Family, Interracial Romance, LGBTQ+, Relationships Gone Wrong
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Open Road Films, Wayne Rice, Gulfstream Pictures, Aperture Media Partners, Mayday Movie Productions, Beatnik Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
